s2.ptxt: Secure the hood support horizontally in a vise with the piston-rod pulled out.
Wear safety glasses. Use a metal saw to slowly cut a groove between A and B shown in the illustration to release the gas.

atten3.ptxt: Although the gas inside the hood support is colorless, odorless, and harmless, metal debris may scatter. Therefore, cover the hood support with a piece of cloth or other material.
